name: prompt-library
description: Prompt Library — a Library-of-Alexandria node aggregating elite prompts across labs (Anthropic, OpenAI, Google, OSS) with full attribution, licensing, evaluation scores, and red-team verdicts. Composes the Starlight Intelligence Protocol (SIP).
principles: Provenance is non-negotiable — every prompt cites its origin
Evaluation before promotion — prompts ship with scores, not vibes
Red-team before publish — jailbreak resistance is a quality dimension
Cross-model attribution — same prompt may carry different verdicts per model family
Open-source by default — proprietary prompts marked clearly
attestation: Built on SIP — Starlight Intelligence Protocol v1.1.1. License: MIT for the library framework. Individual prompts under their attributed licenses (MIT / CC0 / CC-BY / CC-BY-NC depending on source).
